title: Jaded and Exhausted, Many Iranians Shrug at World Cup
summary_full: The successes of Iran’s national soccer team used to be a source of celebration. Now, many Iranians can barely muster the energy to care.
summary_public: The successes of Iran’s national soccer team used to be a source of celebration. Now, many Iranians can barely muster the energy to care.
